item.title: Advancing Hate Speech Detection - A Hybrid Approach Using Large Language Models and Graph Neural Networks
item.description: This project, supported by the NSF Regional Innovation Engines program, analyzes historical collaboration patterns among leading organizations to forecast societal and economic impacts of new technologies using machine learning.

item.title: Automating Large-Scale Analysis of Collaboration Patterns and Socio-Economic Impacts in Emerging Science and Technology
item.description: This project, supported by the NSF Regional Innovation Engines program, analyzes historical collaboration patterns among leading organizations to forecast societal and economic impacts of new technologies using machine learning.
